highlights: Completed graduate coursework in regression, diagnostics, model selection, and resampling-based uncertainty.

high_school.focus_note: Master resume includes all activities; junior/senior years include extra detail.

activities.title: DECA (Chapter Officer)
bullets: Prepared competition case studies and practice presentations; coached newer members on structure and timing.
Organized chapter meeting agendas and coordinated event sign-ups and reminders.

activities.title: Varsity Track and Field
bullets: Competed in sprint events; maintained weekly training logs and tracked personal performance goals.
Helped mentor underclassmen on training routines and meet preparation.

activities.title: Math Tutoring (Peer Tutor)
bullets: Tutored algebra/precalculus students weekly; created custom practice sets and review notes.
Built a regression-based model to explain service request volume using weather and calendar variables; summarized key drivers in a stakeholder report.
Cleaned and joined multi-table datasets in SQL; implemented reproducible analysis notebooks in Python.
Created a dashboard to monitor weekly KPIs and anomalies, improving visibility into trend changes.
Graded homework and projects focused on regression, diagnostics, and resampling; provided written feedback aligned with rubrics.
Supported office hours during exam review periods and helped students debug analysis code.
Tutored undergraduate students in calculus, probability, and introductory statistics; explained concepts and guided problem-solving steps.
Developed short review guides for common exam topics and shared them with tutoring teams.

research.focus_area: Model diagnostics and uncertainty quantification for observational studies
bullets: Evaluated regression model assumptions using residual diagnostics and sensitivity checks.
Implemented bootstrap procedures for uncertainty estimates in model-derived quantities.

artifacts.title: Diagnostics and Bootstrap Uncertainty in Regression

bullets: Built daily and hourly regression models for bike rental demand; compared baseline OLS to interaction and nonlinear extensions.
Used model selection (AIC/CV RMSE) and diagnostics to choose a final model; applied bootstrap to quantify uncertainty in key effects.
Modeled listing prices using multiple regression with categorical predictors; performed model selection and residual diagnostics.
Compared linear vs polynomial specifications for key continuous predictors and reported effects with confidence intervals.
Cleaned survey responses and created summary tables and plots for demographic and outcome variables.
Built logistic regression baselines to explore associations between student outcomes and covariates.

leadership.title: Graduate Student Representative
bullets: Organized study sessions for core courses and coordinated peer support groups.
Helped plan a student research poster session and facilitated feedback rounds.

awards.title: Undergraduate Excellence Award
awards.details: Recognition for academic performance and tutoring contributions

publications_presentations.title: Diagnostics and Bootstrap Uncertainty in Regression

bullets: Provided weekly tutoring support in math and introductory statistics for local high school students.

metadata.notes: Master resume intentionally includes exhaustive content for downstream ranking/selection into tailored resumes.
